title: Sample Lesson
description: A reusable sample lesson for testing the AI Chess Teaching Engine.

steps.speaker: Coco
steps.title: Reusable Engine
steps.message: This lesson runs as an automatic classroom timeline.

steps.speaker: Coco
steps.message: Multiple squares can glow at the same time while I keep teaching.

steps.speaker: Coco
steps.message: Which square is your knight on?
steps.successMessage: Excellent! You correctly identified the knight on C3.
steps.failureMessage: Not quite right. The knight is on C3.

steps.speaker: Coco
steps.message: Now click D4 when you are ready.
